evidence: "I love horror/thriller type fare, and 'Lovely Molly' is one to own."
"Overall, i enjoyed it quite a bit."
"The story has many layers to it."
"It tells its own story, while borrowing elements from 'The Entity' and 'Paranormal Activity.'"
"The story builds with an artsy slow burn, but it is very effective and the pace is never dull or lacking."
"Those complaining that it is 'slow moving,' need to step away from their 'Saw' DVD library."
"It is wonderfully shot (the cinematography is exceptional) and wonderfully acted."
"The director & actors got all of the details right..."
No specific mentions of favorite directors or actors.
General enjoyment of various horror films without specific loyalty.
"This film exudes a sort of beautiful, depressing melancholia..."
"A good film can really inject you, emotionally, into what's on screen."
"You care about Molly, and you care about the people that care about her."

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror and thriller genres, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They enjoy films that evoke emotional resonance and have a vivid sensory experience, though they show mixed feelings towards pacing, indicating a tolerance for both slow and fast narratives.
